commands.review_summary:
The branch moves the browser `/snapshot` current-tab policy guard ahead of local-managed content reads and adds route tests for blocked direct-CDP AI and ARIA snapshots plus selector-precedence behavior.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can reach local-managed direct-CDP AI and ARIA snapshot readers after `ensureTabAvailable` without the current-tab result guard when Playwright is unavailable. I did not establish a live browser-control reproduction.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor runtime proof plus maintainer merge handling for a protected-label PR and intentional fail-closed behavior; automation cannot supply the contributor’s real environment proof.

target.title: fix(browser): validate current tab before snapshots
target.body:
## Summary
- Validates the selected browser tab URL before returning snapshot data.
- Adds route-level regression coverage for local-managed direct-CDP snapshot paths.

## Changes
- Applies the existing browser navigation result guard before `/snapshot` branches read page content.
- Keeps the existing request validation order for incompatible snapshot options.
- Covers ARIA and AI role snapshot CDP paths when the current tab is blocked by policy.

## Validation
- Ran `corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts`
- Ran `corepack pnpm exec oxlint extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts`
- Ran a static source-path check confirming the current-tab validation appears before direct-CDP snapshot calls.
- Attempted `corepack pnpm test -- extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.local-managed.test.ts`; local execution is blocked because the git-hosted `@openclaw/fs-safe` package was installed without built `dist` output after its prepack failed on a missing `JSX` namespace from `@types/mdx`.
- Attempted local agentic review with `claude -p "/review"`; the command stayed silent for multiple minutes and was terminated.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `/snapshot` now validates the selected tab URL before any branch returns page snapshot data from ChromeMCP, Playwright, or direct CDP.
- **Real environment tested:** Local checkout of branch `570` at `a4fcffbfaf` on Node `v22.22.2`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran a local `node` source-path check against `extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/agent.snapshot.ts` after the patch.
- **Evidence after fix:** Terminal output from the after-fix `node` command:

```json
{
  "snapshotCurrentUrlCheckBeforeBranches": true,
  "snapshotPolicyContextBeforeBranches": true,
  "aiCdpCallsSnapshotRoleViaCdp": true,
  "ariaCdpCallsSnapshotAria": true
}
```

- **Observed result after fix:** The output shows `/snapshot` performs current-tab validation before the route reaches the direct-CDP AI and ARIA snapshot branches, while those CDP branches still exist and remain reachable only after the guard.
- **What was not tested:** Full browser-control runtime request proof was blocked locally because dependency installation cannot build the git-hosted `@openclaw/fs-safe` package; the test runner fails before test discovery with `Cannot find package '@openclaw/fs-safe/config'`.

## Notes
- No changelog entry; this is an internal browser-route behavior fix.
- Local install note: `corepack pnpm install` failed while preparing `@openclaw/fs-safe@0.1.2` from the git tarball with `TS2503: Cannot find namespace 'JSX'` in `@types/mdx`.
target.author: eleqtrizit
